discrepancies.summary: Relay 064 Section 2 (WRITE-UP CONTENT SPEC) renders a draft 12-row WZ-balance table with mu_dom and mu_sub values that diverge from the LANE-2 P2 substrate (independent_depth_probe.md L77-87 + L121-126). Relay 064 also renders A_naive at d=3 rows differently from P2. Substrate values were rendered in supplement per relay 064 STEP 3 directive 'Reproduce P2's extended table verbatim'.

details.internal_consistency_of_prompt_table: Relay 064 prompt table at d=2 alpha-direction has mu_dom=1/2 and mu_sub=-3/2 with A_naive=3, but mu_dom - mu_sub = 1/2 - (-3/2) = 2, not 3. Twelve rows of the prompt table appear to use a different convention than 'A_naive = mu_dom - mu_sub' (or contain transcription errors). The relay 064 STEP 3 directive 'Reproduce P2's extended table verbatim' overrides; the supplement renders P2 substrate verbatim (not the prompt's restated table).
details.consistency_check_p2_substrate: P2 rows uniformly satisfy A_naive = mu_dom - mu_sub: at d=2 alpha: 2 - (-1) = 3 OK; at d=3 alpha: 3 - (-1) = 4 OK; at d=4 alpha: 4 - (-1) = 5 OK; at d=2 (1,b) corner: 2 - (-2) = 4 OK; etc. Twelve rows internally consistent.
details.consistency_check_v6_substrate: V6 (independent_substrate_verification.md L240-282) gives mu_dom=d (Step 2) and mu_sub=-d at deg_a=0 (Step 3), hence A_naive = 2d at deg_a=0. Matches P2 substrate (mu_dom=d,d,d at d=2,3,4 in Phase A original 9-row table). DOES NOT match prompt 064 Section 2 draft table (which shows mu_dom=0 at the (1,b) rows).

discrepancies.resolution: Supplement renders P2 + V6 substrate verbatim (see phase_a_supplementary_deg_a_zero.md sec 2.1, 2.2, 2.3). Relay 064 STEP 3 directive 'Reproduce P2's extended table verbatim' is the operative instruction. The discrepant draft table in relay 064 Section 2 is treated as a stale-draft artefact (Synthesizer to flag for prompt-template review at next CMB-edit pass).
discrepancies.downstream_action: If a future re-fire wants the draft table form, supplement v2 can render BOTH conventions side-by-side and identify which (if any) maps to a different normalisation of the Newton-polygon balance equation. Out of scope for this fire.

discrepancies.summary: Relay 064 WRITE-UP CONTENT SPEC target length: ~350-450 lines markdown; ~10-15 KB. Actual supplement length: 304 lines, 16792 bytes (~16.4 KB). Lines 46 below floor (304 vs 350); bytes 1.4 KB above ceiling (16792 vs 15000).
discrepancies.resolution: Content-completeness over line-count padding. All seven sections of the spec (1 SCOPE, 2 WZ-BALANCE TABLE, 3 BALANCE-III RECAP, 4 PHASE D CONSEQUENCE, 5 V_QUAD ROW-MEMBERSHIP, 6 AEAL CLAIMS, 7 BIBLIOGRAPHY) are rendered with verbatim substrate citations. Line count is below target because verbatim block-quotes are densely formatted; byte count exceeds upper soft target because tables + SHA-anchor bibliography section are byte-heavy. No content cuts; no padding added.
discrepancies.downstream_action: If future LANE-1 review requires expanded line count, additional substrate citations (e.g., per-impl P1 verbatim cf_value blocks at all 9 impls; or expanded V_quad lower-vs-upper-branch row-membership comparison table) can be appended without altering the substantive findings.

discrepancies.summary: Relay 064 PRECONDITIONS Section 3 draft note suggests V6 spans 'L210-308' to be verified at fire time. Verified: V6 section header at L210, V6 summary table rows at L294-302, V6 closing analysis at L304-308. Confirmed range L210-308 is correct.
discrepancies.resolution: No action required; draft note was correct. Cited line range used in supplement sec 3 ('V6, L210-308' for the V6 section as a whole, with sub-step ranges 'V6, L249-258' for Step 3 recessive, 'V6, L274-282' for Step 4 A_naive, 'V6, L240-244' for Step 2 dominant, 'V6, L260-266' for general Wallis case sign).

summary: Three discrepancies surfaced; all non-blocking. D1 (prompt-table vs P2-substrate divergence at all 12 rows) resolved by following relay 064 STEP 3 'Reproduce P2's extended table verbatim' directive. D2 (line count below target) resolved by content-completeness rule. D3 (V6 line range verification) confirmed correct as drafted.
